## Workspace request

- **Manifest:** `workspaces/<name>.yaml`
- **Environment:** dev / stg / prd / sbx
- **Business purpose:**
- **Owner group(s):**
- **Capacity:**
- **Domain:**
- **Sensitivity label:**

## Checklist

- [ ] Manifest follows naming convention `<env>-<bu>-<purpose>`
- [ ] At least 2 owner groups specified (Entra security groups, not individuals)
- [ ] Capacity from approved allow-list
- [ ] Description ≥ 30 chars and explains business purpose
- [ ] Reviewed cost-center and region

The **validate** workflow will post detailed pass/fail per rule.
